interactions.summary: That's kind of what I mean. I'm like, yeah, human nature is to protect one's incentives. And, you know, the media didn't like Mark Zuckerberg and Facebook because 70 -80 % of ad revenue went to Google and Facebook. So they had a bit of a war. So I kind of get it.
